title: Claude's Form
introHtml: A guided recreation of the Unshared Amount Sharing Request. Tell us what brings you here and we'll show only the steps you need.

pages.title: About You
pages.description: The same details no matter what you are submitting.

pages.title: Tell Us What is Going On

fields.name: ay_member_id
fields.label: ShareWell member ID
fields.helperText: Enter the member ID from your ID card.

fields.name: surg_hero
fields.label: Surgery intro
fields.contentHtml:
Upcoming

Tell us about your surgery before it happens. We'll review your case and work on payment ahead of time.

fields.name: surg_surgeon_name
fields.label: Your surgeon's name
fields.helperText: The doctor doing the surgery

fields.name: surg_npi
fields.label: Surgeon's NPI number
fields.helperText: Ask the doctor's office — they'll know

fields.name: surg_tax_id
fields.label: Surgeon's Tax ID number
fields.helperText: Ask the doctor's office — they'll know

fields.name: surg_in_network
fields.label: Is your doctor in-network?
fields.helperText: Check with your doctor's office

fields.name: surg_procedure
fields.label: What surgery are you having?
fields.helperText: Name of procedure + the procedure code if you have it

fields.name: surg_estimate
fields.label: Price estimate from the hospital and surgeon
fields.helperText: Ask their billing department for an itemized estimate

fields.name: surg_switch_doctor
fields.label: Would you switch to a different doctor if we find a lower price?
fields.helperText: Just a yes or no — no pressure

fields.name: surg_forms_intro
fields.label: Forms to sign intro
fields.contentHtml:
The 3 forms to sign and send back

Download each form, sign it, and upload it below. Your clinical review can't begin until all three are in.

  • HIPAA Release Form — lets us access your medical records.
  • UA Form — confirms your share amount.
  • Clinical Intake Form — basic health info for our review.

fields.name: surg_hipaa_file
fields.label: Upload your signed HIPAA Release Form
fields.helperText: Lets us access your medical records

fields.name: surg_ua_file
fields.label: Upload your signed UA Form
fields.helperText: Confirms your share amount

fields.name: surg_clinical_file
fields.label: Upload your signed Clinical Intake Form
fields.helperText: Basic health info for our review

fields.name: surg_visit_notes
fields.label: Last 3 visit notes from your doctor
fields.helperText: Ask your doctor's office to send these — they're called "clinical dictations"

fields.name: surg_test_results
fields.label: Any recent test results related to this surgery
fields.helperText: Labs, X-rays, MRIs, etc.

fields.name: surg_footer
fields.label: Surgery footer callout
fields.contentHtml: Heads up: We can't start your clinical review until we have all 3 signed forms and the last 3 visit notes from your doctor. The sooner you send these, the faster we can get to work!

fields.name: post_hero
fields.label: Post-surgery intro
fields.contentHtml:
Completed

Your surgery is done — now let's get you reimbursed. Gather your bills and records and upload them here.

fields.name: post_npi
fields.label: Surgeon's NPI number
fields.helperText: Ask the doctor's office if you don't have it

fields.name: post_tax_id
fields.label: Surgeon's Tax ID number
fields.helperText: Ask the doctor's office if you don't have it

fields.name: post_procedure
fields.label: What surgery did you have?
fields.helperText: Name of procedure + the procedure code if you have it

fields.name: post_bill_facility
fields.label: The hospital or surgery center bill
fields.helperText: Must show every charge individually — not just a total

fields.name: post_bill_surgeon
fields.label: The surgeon's bill
fields.helperText: This often comes separately from the hospital bill

fields.name: post_bill_anesthesia
fields.label: The anesthesia bill
fields.helperText: If you had anesthesia — also usually a separate bill

fields.name: post_bill_selfpay
fields.label: Proof the bill was billed as self-pay
fields.helperText: A note from billing, or a rejection letter from insurance is fine

fields.name: post_bill_other
fields.label: Any other bills from this same surgery
fields.helperText: Labs, pathology, follow-up visits related to the surgery

fields.name: post_surgical_report
fields.label: The surgical report
fields.helperText: What the surgeon documented during the procedure

fields.name: post_discharge
fields.label: Discharge paperwork
fields.helperText: Only if you stayed overnight in the hospital

fields.name: post_test_results
fields.label: Any test results from this surgery
fields.helperText: Labs, biopsies, imaging ordered around the time of surgery

fields.name: post_footer
fields.label: Post-surgery footer callout
fields.contentHtml: Submit within 2 weeks of your surgery date. Don't worry if your bill says "self-pay" or shows an insurance rejection — that's totally normal with ShareWELL. We work with self-pay rates and reimburse you after your Unshared Amount (UA) is met.

fields.name: er_hero
fields.label: ER intro
fields.contentHtml:
Emergency

You went to the ER — we've got you. Collect everything from that visit and upload it here.

fields.name: er_npi
fields.label: Hospital's NPI number
fields.helperText: Call the hospital billing department — they'll have it

fields.name: er_tax_id
fields.label: Hospital's Tax ID number
fields.helperText: Call the hospital billing department — they'll have it

fields.name: er_visit_date
fields.label: The date you went to the ER

fields.name: er_doctor_name
fields.label: The ER doctor's name
fields.helperText: Check your discharge paperwork if you're not sure

fields.name: er_reason
fields.label: Why did you go? What was the diagnosis?
fields.helperText: You can write it in your own words — we just need a general idea

fields.name: er_bill_hospital
fields.label: The hospital ER bill
fields.helperText: Must show every charge individually — not just a total

fields.name: er_bill_doctor
fields.label: The doctor's bill
fields.helperText: ER doctors often bill separately from the hospital

fields.name: er_bill_selfpay
fields.label: Proof the bill was billed as self-pay
fields.helperText: A note from billing or an insurance rejection letter works

fields.name: er_bill_followup
fields.label: Any follow-up bills from this same visit
fields.helperText: Specialist visits, labs, or imaging that came from this ER trip

fields.name: er_visit_notes
fields.label: Your ER visit notes
fields.helperText: Ask the hospital for a copy of your records from this visit

fields.name: er_lab_imaging
fields.label: Lab or imaging results from the visit
fields.helperText: Blood work, X-rays, CT scans, etc.

fields.name: er_discharge
fields.label: Your discharge instructions
fields.helperText: The paperwork they gave you when you left

fields.name: er_footer
fields.label: ER footer callout
fields.contentHtml: Submit within 2 weeks of your ER visit. If this visit led to follow-up care (like a specialist or surgery), those bills may be part of the same request. Bills showing "self-pay" are totally expected — that's how ShareWELL works.

fields.name: other_hero
fields.label: Something else intro
fields.contentHtml:
Other

No problem — fill out your info above and tell us what's going on. Someone from our team will reach out to help.

fields.name: other_description
fields.label: Tell us what's going on
fields.helperText: The more detail you give us, the faster we can help.
fields.placeholder: Example: I had a visit with my doctor on May 10th for ongoing knee pain. My doctor wants me to have physical therapy. I have bills totaling about $800. I'm not sure if this counts as a new sharing request or if it goes with my previous one...

fields.name: other_footer
fields.label: Something else footer callout
fields.contentHtml: Not sure what to submit? Just describe what happened in the box above and we'll take it from there. The more detail you give us, the faster we can help.

fields.name: close_auth_heading
fields.label: Authorization heading
fields.contentHtml:
Authorization to obtain or release medical information

Please read the authorization below, then enter your name and sign.

fields.name: close_phi_terms
fields.label: I have read and agree to the authorization above
fields.termsHtml:
Authorization to Obtain or Release Medical Information

Protected Health Information (PHI) to be Used and/or Disclosed: Any and all information or records relating to the medical history, medical examinations, services rendered, or treatment given, including treatment for alcohol abuse, substance abuse, mental or emotional disorders, A.I.D.S. (Acquired Immune Deficiency Syndrome), or A.R.C (AIDS-related complex). Entities or Persons

Authorized to Use or Disclose: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (including the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services and any contractors or agents, including Medicare intermediaries), any physician or other health care professional, hospital or other health care facility, counselor, therapist or any other medical or medically related facility or professional. Entities or Persons Authorized to Receive: ShareWELL Health Share or its agents, employees, designees, or representatives, including my ShareWELL agent or broker.

Purpose of this Authorization: By signing this form, you will authorize ShareWELL to use and/or disclose your Protected Health Information (PHI). You also will authorize ShareWELL to obtain your Protected Health Information (PHI) from other covered entities so that we may determine payment of a claim for specified benefits involving you.

I have had full opportunity to read and consider the contents of this authorization, and I understand that, by signing this authorization, I am confirming my authorization of the use and/or disclosure of my Protected Health Information, as described in this authorization

A photocopy of this authorization is as valid as the original, and I and my ShareWELL agent or broker are entitled to receive a copy of this form. A COPY OF THIS AUTHORIZATION IS BEING PROVIDED TO YOU. YOU MAY ALSO REQUEST A COPY OF THE SIGNED AUTHORIZATION FROM US

I certify that the above statements and answers on this claim form are true and correct.

WARNING: Any person who knowingly presents a false or fraudulent claim for payment of a loss or benefit or knowingly presents false information in an application for insurance is guilty of a crime and may be subject to fines and confinement in prison.

fields.name: close_signature
fields.label: Signature
fields.helperText: Sign below. A timestamp and IP hash are recorded with your signature for audit purposes (not full IP storage).

fields.name: close_dd_intro
fields.label: Direct deposit intro
fields.contentHtml:
Your banking information (ACH direct deposit)

If your sharing request is approved, we'll send your reimbursement directly to your bank account via ACH direct deposit. Providing this now means you'll get paid faster — no checks, no extra steps. Your banking information is encrypted and used solely to disburse funds to you.

fields.name: close_dd_holder
fields.label: Account holder name
fields.helperText: Must match the name on the bank account exactly.
fields.placeholder: Full name as it appears on your bank account

fields.name: close_dd_routing
fields.label: Routing number
fields.helperText: The 9-digit number on the bottom-left of a check.

fields.name: close_dd_footer
fields.label: Direct deposit footer note
fields.contentHtml: 🔒 Your banking details are encrypted and stored securely. They will only be used to disburse approved sharing amounts and will never be shared with third parties.

submissionPdf.companyLetterhead:
ShareWell Partners
90 Fort Wade Rd Ste 100
Ponte Verda FL 32081
